description: Use the N/xml module to validate, parse, read, and modify XML documents.

methods.name: escape
methods.description: Prepares a string for use in XML by escaping XML markup, such as angle brackets, quotation marks, and ampersands.

params.name: options.xmlText
params.description: The string to escape for use in XML.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates an XML document against an XML Schema (XSD).

params.name: options.xsdFilePathOrId
params.description: File Cabinet path or internal ID of the XSD schema.

params.name: options.importFolderPathOrId
params.description: File Cabinet path or ID of folder for imported schemas.

enums.name: NodeType
enums.description: Holds the string values for the supported node types. Use this enum to determine the type of a node in an XML document and to set the Node.nodeType property. Enum values are constants and therefore read-only.

objectTypes.name: Parser
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates the functionality used by NetSuite to parse XML.

methods.name: fromString
methods.description: Parses a string into a W3C XML document object.

methods.name: toString
methods.description: Converts (serializes) an xml.Document object into a string.

objectTypes.name: XPath
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates the functionality used by NetSuite to run XPath expressions. XPath is a standard for enumerating paths in an XML document collection.

methods.name: select
methods.description: Selects an array of nodes from an XML document using an XPath expression.

objectTypes.name: Document
objectTypes.description: Represents an entire XML document. The XML DOM presents a document as a hierarchy of node objects. Document inherits from Node.

properties.name: doctype
properties.description: Returns a node of type DOCUMENT_TYPE_NODE that represents the doctype.

properties.name: documentElement
properties.description: Root node of the XML document.

properties.name: documentURI
properties.description: Location of the document or null if undefined.

properties.name: inputEncoding
properties.description: Encoding used when the document was parsed.

properties.name: xmlEncoding
properties.description: Part of the XML declaration, the XML encoding of the document.

properties.name: xmlStandalone
properties.description: Part of the XML declaration, returns true if the document is standalone.

properties.name: xmlVersion
properties.description: Part of the XML declaration, the version number of the document.

objectTypes.name: Node
objectTypes.description: Represents a generic XML node in an XML document. A node can be a Document, Element, or Attribute.

properties.name: nodeType
properties.description: The type of node defined as a value from xml.NodeType enum.

properties.name: nodeName
properties.description: Name of a node, depending on the type.

properties.name: nodeValue
properties.description: The value of a node, depending on its type.

properties.name: childNodes
properties.description: Array of all child nodes or empty array if none.

properties.name: parentNode
properties.description: The parent node.

properties.name: firstChild
properties.description: First child node or null.

properties.name: lastChild
properties.description: Last child node or null.

properties.name: nextSibling
properties.description: The next node in a node list or null.

properties.name: previousSibling
properties.description: The previous node in a node list or null.

properties.name: ownerDocument
properties.description: The root element for a node as xml.Document.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Key-value pairs for all attributes for an Element node. Returns null for other node types.

properties.name: baseURI
properties.description: Absolute base URI of a node or null.

properties.name: localName
properties.description: The local part of the qualified name.

properties.name: namespaceURI
properties.description: The namespace URI or null.

properties.name: prefix
properties.description: The namespace prefix or null.

properties.name: textContent
properties.description: The textual content of a node and its descendants.

objectTypes.name: Element
objectTypes.description: Represents an element in an XML document. Elements may contain attributes, other elements, or text. Element inherits from Node.

properties.name: tagName
properties.description: The tag name of this Element object.

objectTypes.name: Attr
objectTypes.description: Represents an attribute node of an xml.Element object.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of an attribute.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Value of an attribute. Character and general entity references are replaced with their values.

properties.name: specified
properties.description: Returns true if the attribute value is set in the parsed XML, false if it is a default value in a DTD or Schema.

properties.name: ownerElement
properties.description: The Element object that is the parent of this Attr.
